parameters.query:
INSERT INTO exentia.bookings (
  booking_code, ghl_appointment_id, ghl_contact_id,
  cliente_nombre, cliente_telefono, cliente_email,
  servicios, fecha_agendada, hora_agendada, duracion_total_min,
  estado
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7::jsonb, $8::date, $9::time, $10, 'reservo'
)
ON CONFLICT (ghl_appointment_id) WHERE ghl_appointment_id IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  fecha_agendada = EXCLUDED.fecha_agendada,
  hora_agendada = EXCLUDED.hora_agendada,
  duracion_total_min = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.duracion_total_min, exentia.bookings.duracion_total_min),
  cliente_nombre = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.cliente_nombre, ''), exentia.bookings.cliente_nombre),
  cliente_telefono = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.cliente_telefono, exentia.bookings.cliente_telefono),
  cliente_email = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.cliente_email, ''), exentia.bookings.cliente_email),
  ghl_contact_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.ghl_contact_id, exentia.bookings.ghl_contact_id)
RETURNING id, booking_code, ghl_appointment_id, fecha_agendada, hora_agendada;
